packageRules.description: Hold the arrow crate family at 58.x. DataFusion 54 pins arrow ^58, so a standalone arrow 59 bump splits the workspace's arrow types and breaks the build. Lift together with the DataFusion 55 upgrade (RFC 0021 phase 2, which also gates the thrift advisory, #295) - the same pattern as the object_store hold below.

Hold object_store at 0.13.x. DataFusion 53 pins object_store ^0.13, and ourios-querier hands ourios-parquet's Store::object_store() to DataFusion's register_object_store (RFC 0013 §2.2), so the two crates must share one object_store version. Bumping to 0.14 splits the Arc<dyn ObjectStore> type at that boundary and breaks the build. Lift this together with a DataFusion upgrade (which also gates the thrift advisory, #295).

Don't digest-pin the chart's default image. image.tag is deliberately empty (floating latest; the values.yaml comment tells operators to pin a released tag in production), so a point-in-time digest in the published chart's defaults contradicts that contract - and renovate writes it as a bare @sha256:... tag, which the ourios.image helper renders as an invalid repo:@sha256:... reference.
